mapper.select: SELECT name FROM project_info WHERE id = #{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM version_package WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO version_package (project_id, jar_name, file_path, file_size, version, sha256, remark, package_type, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{jarName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{version}, #{sha256}, #{remark}, #{packageType}, #{createTime})
